title: SoundHound AI (SOUN) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
text: Revenue reached $44.2 million, representing a 52% year-over-year increase. Organic growth in automotive and IoT AI segments climbed 88% excluding acquisitions. Non-GAAP gross margin stood at 50%, though GAAP margin fell to 31% due to temporary vendor costs. The company announced a definitive agreement to acquire LivePerson, its fifth major acquisition. Management indicated the combined entity could achieve $500 million based on the existing customer base alone once integrations complete. SoundHound introduced OASIS, an orchestrated AI agent platform enabling AI-built AI capabilities. This platform allows rapid deployment across channels—what once took businesses months can now take just minutes—with autonomous self-improvement features. A Fortune 100 insurance client achieved over $10 million in quarterly labor savings using SoundHound solutions. The company reported zero customer concentration, with no single client exceeding 10% of quarterly revenue. 2026 guidance: $225-$260 million revenue. 2027 post-acquisition projection: $350-$400 million, including minimum $100 million from LivePerson.
